# Folder Structure Example

## Overview

This example shows a fully populated MAUI project using the recommended structure.

```code
[root]
в”њв”Ђ Dependencies
в”‚  в””в”Ђ [The default Dependencies folder created by the MAUI template]
в”њв”Ђ Properties
в”‚  в””в”Ђ launchSettings.json
в”њв”Ђ Models
в”‚  в””в”Ђ [Add model classes here]
в”њв”Ђ Platforms
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Android
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Resources
в”‚  в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ values
в”‚  в”‚  в”‚     в””в”Ђ colors.xml
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ AndroidManifest.xml
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ MainActivity.cs
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ MainApplication.cs
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ iOS
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Resources
в”‚  в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ PrivacyInfo.xcprivacy
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ AppDelegate.cs
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Info.plist
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ MacCatalyst
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ AppDelegate.cs
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Entitlements.plist
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Info.plist
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ Program.cs
в”‚  в””в”Ђ Windows
в”‚     в”њв”Ђ app.manifest
в”‚     в”њв”Ђ App.xaml
в”‚     в”‚  в””в”Ђ App.xaml.cs
в”‚     в””в”Ђ Package.appxmanifest
в”њв”Ђ Resources
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ AppIcon
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ appicon.svg
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ appiconfg.svg
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Fonts
в”‚  в”‚  в”њв”Ђ OpenSans-Regular.ttf
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ OpenSans-Semibold.ttf
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Images
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ dotnet_bot.png
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ raw
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ AboutAssets.txt
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Splash
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ splash.svg
в”‚  в””в”Ђ Styles
в”‚     в”њв”Ђ Colors.xaml
в”‚     в””в”Ђ Styles.xaml
в”њв”Ђ Services
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Interfaces
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ [Add service interfaces here]
в”‚  в””в”Ђ [Add service classes here]
в”њв”Ђ ViewModels
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ MainViewModel.cs
в”‚  в””в”Ђ [Add other ViewModels here]
в”њв”Ђ Views
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ Controls
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ [Add custom controls here]
в”‚  в”њв”Ђ MainPage.xaml
в”‚  в”‚  в””в”Ђ MainPage.xaml.cs
в”‚  в””в”Ђ Templates
в”‚    в””в”Ђ [Add custom templates here]
в”њв”Ђ App.xaml
в”‚  в””в”Ђ App.xaml.cs
в””в”Ђ MauiProgram.cs
```
